report: 45-year-old male presenting with acute lower back pain radiating down the left leg for 3 weeks. History of manual labor and heavy lifting. Numbness in the outer calf.
Patient reports sudden loss of bladder control and significant weakness in both legs since this morning. No prior history of back issues.
60 year old female. Chronic Sciatica L5 level. Pain is moderate, worse with sitting. Weight 75kg.
